Ensemble Feature Selection Basics
=================================

This tutorial introduces the principles of ensemble feature selection (EFS)
and how ``pyensemblefs`` implements them.

Topics
------

- Why ensemble feature selection?
- Variance, ranking, frequency and score-based methods
- Basic usage examples

Example
-------

.. code-block:: python

   from pyensemblefs.ensemble.featureselector import EnsembleFeatureSelector
   from pyensemblefs.ensemble.bootstrapper import Bootstrapper
   from pyensemblefs.aggregators.rank import MeanRankAggregator
   from pyensemblefs.fsmethods.factory import get_fs_method

   # Create the feature selection method
   fs_method = get_fs_method("variance")

   # Create the bootstrapper
   bootstrapper = Bootstrapper(fsmethod=fs_method, n_bootstraps=10)

   # Create the aggregator
   aggregator = MeanRankAggregator()

   # Create the selector
   selector = EnsembleFeatureSelector(bootstrapper=bootstrapper, aggregator=aggregator, k=10)
   selector.fit(X, y)
